---
title: "Spatial Decision Analytics Portfolio"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<div class="hero-shell">
<div class="hero-copy">
<p class="eyebrow">Dissertation hub for defense and recruiter review</p>
<h2 class="hero-heading">Jaeseok Hwang</h2>
<p class="hero-lead">PhD candidate in Applied Economics building spatial decision systems that connect field data, predictive modeling, and economic risk evaluation.</p>
<p class="hero-lead">This site now focuses on three dissertation chapters, the GitHub repos behind them, and a new spatial-analysis platform built around grower, market, and policy decisions.</p>
<div class="hero-actions">
<a class="action-link" href="research/index.html">Open Research Atlas</a>
<a class="action-link secondary" href="research/working_papers.html">Open Spatial Decision Lab</a>
<a class="action-link secondary" href="resume/Resume_Jaeseok.pdf" target="_blank">Resume PDF</a>
<a class="action-link ghost" href="https://github.com/jaeseokh" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
<a class="action-link ghost" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jaeseok-hwang-0b06741a1" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="hero-panel">
<p class="eyebrow">Portfolio signal</p>
<div class="chip-row">
<span class="chip">Spatial analysis</span>
<span class="chip">Economic decisions</span>
<span class="chip">Validation risk</span>
<span class="chip">GitHub-first</span>
</div>
<div class="metric-grid">
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Research frame</div>
<div class="metric-value">Three connected dissertation chapters</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Primary stack</div>
<div class="metric-value">Python, R, SQL, GeoPandas, XGBoost</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Validation lens</div>
<div class="metric-value">Holdouts, uncertainty, structural checks</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Outcome focus</div>
<div class="metric-value">Visual results, contribution, challenge</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

## Spatial Thesis Atlas {.unnumbered}

<div class="surface atlas-shell">
<div class="atlas-board" role="img" aria-label="A three-part visual linking the dissertation chapters through spatial transfer, profitability risk decomposition, and value of information.">
<div class="atlas-ribbon">Data -> Validation -> Decision -> Monitoring</div>
<div class="atlas-track">
<div class="atlas-column">
<p class="eyebrow">Chapter 1</p>
<h3>Transfer Across Fields</h3>
<p class="atlas-sub">Can information move from one field to another without breaking decision quality?</p>
<div class="tile-grid" aria-hidden="true">
<span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span>
<span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span>
</div>
<div class="risk-bar" aria-hidden="true"><span></span></div>
<p class="atlas-note">Holdout maps and transfer-risk comparisons</p>
</div>

<div class="atlas-column">
<p class="eyebrow">Chapter 2</p>
<h3>Profitability Risk Split</h3>
<p class="atlas-sub">How much loss comes from the decision rule and how much from exogenous shocks?</p>
<div class="stack-bars" aria-hidden="true">
<div>
<div class="stack">
<span class="core" style="height: 44%;"></span>
<span class="shock" style="height: 18%;"></span>
</div>
<div class="label">Observed</div>
</div>
<div>
<div class="stack">
<span class="core" style="height: 58%;"></span>
<span class="shock" style="height: 24%;"></span>
</div>
<div class="label">Decision</div>
</div>
<div>
<div class="stack">
<span class="core" style="height: 70%;"></span>
<span class="shock" style="height: 30%;"></span>
</div>
<div class="label">Shock</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="atlas-note">Bayesian decomposition of controllable vs. uncontrollable loss</p>
</div>

<div class="atlas-column">
<p class="eyebrow">Chapter 3</p>
<h3>Value of Information</h3>
<p class="atlas-sub">When do monitored signals change actions enough to justify the extra information?</p>
<div class="paired-grid" aria-hidden="true">
<div class="pair"><span class="bar base" style="height: 48%;"></span><span class="bar signal" style="height: 62%;"></span></div>
<div class="pair"><span class="bar base" style="height: 44%;"></span><span class="bar signal" style="height: 72%;"></span></div>
<div class="pair"><span class="bar base" style="height: 56%;"></span><span class="bar signal" style="height: 78%;"></span></div>
<div class="pair"><span class="bar base" style="height: 40%;"></span><span class="bar signal" style="height: 66%;"></span></div>
</div>
<div class="signal-dots" aria-hidden="true">
<span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span>
</div>
<p class="atlas-note">Paired-strip comparisons and heterogeneous treatment effects</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="atlas-caption">A single portfolio story: field-level spatial data feed a validation pipeline, economic loss is decomposed into controllable and uncontrollable parts, and extra information is valued only when it changes decisions under uncertainty.</p>
</div>

## Three Connected Chapters {.unnumbered}

<div class="chapter-grid">
<div class="chapter-card">
<p class="eyebrow">Chapter 1</p>
<h3>Transferability of Multi-Field Information</h3>
<p class="hub-focus">Focus: whether information learned in one field can be trusted in another field.</p>
<div class="hub-link-row">
<a href="research/chapter1.html">Open summary</a>
<a href="https://github.com/jaeseokh/value_multifield_python" target="_blank">GitHub repo</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="chapter-card">
<p class="eyebrow">Chapter 2</p>
<h3>Information Validity and Profitability Risk</h3>
<p class="hub-focus">Focus: separating decision error from exogenous weather and market shocks.</p>
<div class="hub-link-row">
<a href="research/chapter2.html">Open summary</a>
<a href="https://github.com/jaeseokh/corn_seed_response" target="_blank">GitHub repo</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="chapter-card">
<p class="eyebrow">Chapter 3</p>
<h3>Value of Information in Stochastic Environments</h3>
<p class="hub-focus">Focus: when monitored signals improve decisions enough to justify the information itself.</p>
<div class="hub-link-row">
<a href="research/chapter3.html">Open summary</a>
<a href="https://github.com/jaeseokh/value_multifield_ofpe" target="_blank">GitHub repo</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

## What Is Deliberately Foregrounded {.unnumbered}

<div class="tone-strip">
<div class="process-card">
<p class="eyebrow">Cleanup</p>
<h3>High-signal pages only</h3>
<p>Older study-note links and lightly maintained source pages are no longer the center of the site. The front page now stays focused on thesis chapters, visual outputs, GitHub repositories, and the resume.</p>
</div>

<div class="process-card">
<p class="eyebrow">New Platform</p>
<h3>Spatial Decision Lab</h3>
<p>The next public page now shifts away from the old defense brief and toward a new research platform built around API data, index-driven decisions, and spatial-economic intuition for growers, firms, and government.</p>
<p><a href="research/working_papers.html">Open the platform page</a></p>
</div>
</div>
